title: Add Project Manager and Location Contact fields

requirements.text: Add a 'Project Manager' text input field to the ReportForm component in the Project Info section, allowing users to enter the project manager's name. Include this field in the ReportData interface and render it in the generated PDF under the project info section.
acceptanceCriteria: A labeled 'Project Manager' text input appears in the ReportForm within the project info section
The entered value is stored in form state
The Project Manager name appears in the generated PDF report under project info
The ReportData interface includes a projectManager field

requirements.text: Add a 'Location Contact' text input field to the ReportForm component in the Project Info section, allowing users to enter the on-site location contact's name. Include this field in the ReportData interface and render it in the generated PDF under the project info section.
acceptanceCriteria: A labeled 'Location Contact' text input appears in the ReportForm within the project info section
The entered value is stored in form state
The Location Contact name appears in the generated PDF report under project info
The ReportData interface includes a locationContact field

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/
Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Changes to the site photos upload feature
Changes to the auto-fill date/time feature
